storyInfo: The three clans initiate rescue operations after the Catastrophe, but they cannot prevent panic from spreading through the population. Enya realizes that Kjarr has gone missing.

attributes.content: Team Alpha, drop the supplies in the east-side clearing.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Set up medical tents in conjunction with the Paleroche reinforcements and be ready to receive wounded.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Right!
attributes.name: Rescuer A

attributes.content: Team Bravo, take your shovels and wineskins and look for survivors in the ruins of the train station. Be thorough and keep your ears open for any cries.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Alright! Team, grab your gear and follow me—
attributes.name: Rescuer B

attributes.content: Try not to make too much noise. We could still be looking at a second avalanche. A team is on its way to investigate the mountains.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Trust our people, and trust in Kjeragandr's protection.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Rescuer B

attributes.content: ...By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Rescuer A

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Time's a-wasting. Get moving.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Yes, sir!
attributes.name: Rescuers

attributes.content: Before the voices disperse on the cold wind, the servants of Clan Silverash are already on the move, spreading out on the snow in every direction.
They are not the only ones here. The white tide has torn a gash in the peace.
Over here! This one's alive!
attributes.name: Rescuer

attributes.content: Hang in there! You're a son of Kjerag, you can take it!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: M-My leg...
attributes.name: Injured Man

attributes.content: I can't move my leg... my leg is... argh!
attributes.name: Injured Man

attributes.content: Don't move! Somebody in the back, report!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We dug a hole, but his leg is pinned under a steel girder. If we can't get it out of the way, we'll need a surgeon to... no, I'll try to dig it open a little bit more!
attributes.name: Rescuer

attributes.content: Grr—okay! Good news, the girder's already broken! All we need to do is lift it up!
attributes.name: Rescuer

attributes.content: All we need is a little elbow grease! Over here, all hands on deck!
attributes.name: Arctosz
Arctosz
attributes.content: Hold tight, one, two, three...

attributes.name: Arctosz
attributes.content: —Hrragh!!
Argh... it hurts...
attributes.name: Injured Man

attributes.content: We got a gap! Pull him out now!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I got him. Take it easy, lift him up and put him on the tarp. Careful not to pull the wound open...
attributes.name: Rescuer
Rescuer
attributes.content: Slowly, carefully—

attributes.name: Rescuer
attributes.content: Got it! Stretcher!
Out of the way! Stretcher coming through!
attributes.name: Rhodes Island Medic

attributes.content: Suppressed, restrained cries. Rescues. Stretchers. Survivors.
The rescuers run back and forth on the white snow, their faces red with exertion, hot sweat dripping on the snow.
Take over for me here, Gulo. Save every soul you can.
attributes.name: Arctosz
Gulo
attributes.content: Right!

attributes.name: Gulo
attributes.content: But where are you going, sir?
Sir Arctosz... is rescue work in the south already done?
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: No, not yet.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Gulo's overseeing it. I came to find you.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We're handling things here, no need to worry. The Browntails' help has already arrived, they brought blankets and food.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Madame Ratatos wanted to come personally, but she seems to be otherwise engaged.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: ...I figured as much.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We know what's going on. Nobody blames her.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Schiisdräck! The timing of this bloody disaster!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: It came out of the blue. There were no warning signs, no chance to prepare.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Yes! That's why I came to you.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You know the rules. This avalanche happened on Paleroche land, and we're responsible for the mountains here.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We've been watching the thickness of the snowpack. I've seen the records myself. Everything was normal!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: That's why I came to ask. Don't you have people at that research institute of yours whose job is to check on the mountains? What are they saying?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Research institute... you mean Rhine Lab?
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Yeah! They spend all day on the mountains carrying all that newfangled gear. You're not telling me they didn't find anything, are you?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: They have their own projects to deal with, and they don't necessarily focus all their attention on the mountains.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Besides, we came as soon as we heard about the avalanche. We haven't had a chance to find out what they know.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Sir Enciodes sent Degenbrecher up the mountains with a team. They should be back soon.
attributes.name: Matterhorn

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: This is sending chills up my spine. What in blazes is this avalanche...?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The wind wails, carrying snowflakes with it. The man turns around and stares at the mountain. He may be a mountain among men, but he is little more than a pebble before the silent mountains.
Is that...?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: A group is moving quickly down the snowy mountain path, heading for the two men.
Sir Matterhorn!
attributes.name: Investigator

attributes.content: We must let Sir Enciodes know at once! W-We found—
attributes.name: Investigator

attributes.content: The investigator's expression is deathly pale, his fur boots wet and gray with dirty snow.
In the wind, his rapid and ragged breathing sounds almost like wailing.
If there are no further questions about the framework agreement, let us now move on to the detailed terms of the agreement.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: First, concerning taxation of the joint Kjerag-Kazimierz mining endeavor—
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: (Whisper) Sir, Madam Degenbrecher is outside. She has something to report.
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Clerk

attributes.content: ...Right now?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: (Whisper) Yes. She says it's extremely urgent...
attributes.name: Karlan Trade Clerk

attributes.content: What's this urgent matter?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: We found this on the mountain where the avalanche occurred.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Degenbrecher opens her gloved hand, and a small, black shard of Originium lies quietly in her palm.
On a mountain in Kjerag?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If the mountain by the train station counts as Kjerag.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Both Gnosis and Rhodes Island's have examined it. It's almost certain that...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Degenbrecher looks around her, making sure there are no eavesdroppers, and drops her voice.
This avalanche was a Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: How many know?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The investigation team is our people, so we can keep them quiet, but a number of those at the foot of the mountain have been infected.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: It won't be a secret for long.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Instruct Matterhorn to set up a blockade and not allow civilians to approach. I want checkpoints on the mountains as well.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Contact Rhodes Island and request secrecy in the housing and treatment of patients. Tell them to contact Karlan Trade if they need any help.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And tell Ratatos and Arctosz to meet me at the train station in one hour. Whatever it takes.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Understood. Anything else?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: ...Take a squad and go to Vine-Bead Court immediately.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: And tell Gnosis to take a team to protect the Rhine Lab observation station.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Understood.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Enciodes checks his clothes and goes back into the conference room.
I apologize for the delay. Let us continue.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: First, concerning taxation of the joint Kjerag-Kazimierz mining endeavor...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Preposterous... preposterous!
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: There has never been such a prophecy in any of the scriptures. Why would Kjeragandr punish us with a Catastrophe? It's preposterous!
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: But it happened! She has left us because She is angry with us!
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: How do we explain this Catastrophe, if not by Kjeragandr's anger?
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: Look at the crowd surrounding the Vine-Bead Court now. They are pious believers in Kjeragandr, gentle children of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: Are we to tell them that the families and friends they lost, all their suffering, happened for no reason at all?
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: The people are troubled. Their faith is shaken... but it is at times like this that our own faith must be stronger than ever.
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: How do we know this isn't a trial from Kjeragandr to reinforce our faith?
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: Kjeragandr has not abandoned Kjerag... why would She punish Kjerag for no reason?
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: Perhaps it happened because we've acted against Kjeragandr's will—
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: The young cleric takes one look at the Saintess in the middle of the hall, then lowers his head without a word.
You may speak your mind.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Saintess...
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: I believe this is the fury of Kjeragandr... it's a warning...
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: Because the Vine-Bead Court... because we made the wrong choice.
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: We should not have allowed the faithless to build upon Mount Karlan. We should have remained firm, rejected them...
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: If they did not defile the temple of Kjeragandr and anger Her, why would Kjerag...?
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: His voice grows lower, but at the same time firmer. The hall is quiet, with no one speaking out in objection.
I see.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You believe that I, the Saintess, have offended Kjeragandr and brought Catastrophe upon Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: N-No, Saintess, what I mean is...
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: No, your words offer valuable insight. It is not only the people at the foot of the mountain; many who sit among us think the same way.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: This is what is happening now. People doubt the Vine-Bead Court, and you, too, are anxious and wavering.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Cleric Fangot, Cleric Ronoa. One of you believes that Kjeragandr continues to favor us as She always has. The other believes that Kjeragandr has...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She bows and thinks for a moment, her alabaster face calm as ice.
Recite to me the Three Protections detailed in the Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...Yes, Saintess.
attributes.name: Clerics

attributes.content: The First Protection, Page 7, Line 9 of the Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'And so She spoke to the shepherd boy, saying—'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'I shall grant you shelter, and all that you may need.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'I shall hunt in the woods, and I shall plant seeds in the earth, such that you will have furs to wear and food to eat, and neither frost nor famine shall take you.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'And thus, She protects us from the harms of cold and hunger.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: The Second Protection, Page 25, Line 17 of the Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: 'And so the protector came forth from the people, awakened in the clouds of myriad colors, and built high walls of earth watered with snow.'
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: 'And thus, She protects our homes and our kin, and She taught us the means to defend ourselves from our enemies.'
attributes.name: Old Cleric

attributes.content: And... Page 32, Line 2 of the Kjeragandr, towards the end.
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'That day, She proclaimed to the people:'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'My eyes shall watch over you, my fur shall warm you, my backbone shall protect you, while my flesh and blood shall bless you.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'You have learned the way of wind and snow, and learned the form of walking.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: 'You are the people of Kjerag, and the land of Kjerag belongs to you from this day forth.'
attributes.name: Excited Cleric

attributes.content: Very good...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Now tell me... is there anywhere in the Kjeragandr where Kjeragandr promises that Kjerag will always be safe from Catastrophe?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Are you making that promise to Kjeragandr's people on Her behalf?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Many of the seated clerics look down without a word.
It is quiet enough to hear a pin drop. The smell of incense fills the nostrils, but it feels as though their breaths have been frozen in place by the exchange that just occurred.
Your words ring true, Saintess.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Catastrophe has struck Kjerag. Some have died, and others have become afflicted.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: The entire Snow Realm has heard the news. Fear, anxiety, sorrow, and even anger, are spreading throughout the people of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Our duty is to seek a solution.
attributes.name: Vine-Bead Court Elder

attributes.content: Certainly. Now is not the time for debate, and my words are intended as a warning, not to fall into the twin traps of panic and prejudice.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You are the faithful devotees of Kjeragandr, and you understand the weight that words have. No member of the Vine-Bead Court is to speak of 'Kjeragandr's punishment' from this moment forth.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Tomorrow, I will go into the Hall of Writings, and devote myself to studying the scriptures and hearing Her voice.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Elder Adso.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Yes, Saintess.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: As the new Great Elder, you shall oversee the Vine-Bead Court in my stead, during my retreat.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You are to carry out the duties of the court faithfully and diligently, from placating the people to conducting the memorial service and copying the scriptures for the repose of the deceased.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Understood...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: We must have faith...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...Kjerag has weathered many storms and overcome many challenges. The Vine-Bead Court is ever with the people.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: At least things haven't gotten out of hand...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The girl exhales and slumps over the desk, finally able to relax the back that she has kept straight as a fir in the snow.
I don't understand. Why do people keep treating our god as a wishing well? Why do they attribute everything good and bad in their lives to Her?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I know, this is not how I should think, as their Saintess, but...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But I don't understand why a Catastrophe would strike now, either.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Bring in the dressers, please, Kjarr.
attributes.name: Enya
Enya
attributes.content: The funeral preparations are done. Starting tomorrow, we'll...

attributes.name: Enya
attributes.content: Kjarr?
The room is quiet except for the whistling of the wind and the cracking of the fire.
Enya turns to find that the room is completely empty.
Kjarr... where are you?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The handmaiden who should be at the Saintess's side at all times is nowhere to be seen. There is only Enya's own shadow, thin and long in the light of the fireplace, flickering in the dim room.
Kjarr...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Tell me... honestly...
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: Do you still... hear Kjeragandr's voice?
attributes.name: Great Elder

attributes.content: The cracking of burning firewood echoes through the empty room.
The wind continues to wail outside the window. She can almost hear the cries of the bewildered devotees at the foot of Mount Karlan.
Enya recalls the day that she first came to the Saintess's quarters.
An unfamiliar room, an unfamiliar smell. Home was well in sight, yet she would never return there under her own name. At that time, she felt the same emptiness, as though this room were a snowy cave.
But she has grown accustomed to having a companion, someone to whom she can pour her heart out, someone on whom she can rely.
But now...
The Kjeragandr scriptures lie open on the desk. The dressing mirror reflects the girl's helpless expression.
Kjarr...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You promised me you wouldn't disappear so suddenly...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Exactly... what happened?
attributes.name: Enya
